channel.title: Docs Update: "Getting Started" Section Improvements + New "Quick Start Guide" Video
channel.description:
We have recently made some changes to our docs:
* Improved the [Getting Started](https://docs.frontity.org/getting-started) section, which now includes two new pages: [Connect Frontity to Your WordPress Site](https://docs.frontity.org/getting-started/connecting-to-wordpress) and [Next Steps](https://docs.frontity.org/getting-started/next-steps). * Created a new explanatory video for the [Quick Start Guide](https://docs.frontity.org/getting-started/quick-start-guide). * Added a new [About Frontity](https://docs.frontity.org/about) section with two pages: Frontity Features and Get involved. * Moved the JS and React guides to the [Key Concepts](https://docs.frontity.org/resources) section. * The [Welcome to Frontity](https://docs.frontity.org/) page now links to the different sections of the docs.
Thanks @mburridge and @juanma! 🙌

item.title: Docs Update: "Getting Started" Section Improvements + New "Quick Start Guide" Video
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
We have recently made some changes to our docs:

  • Improved the Getting Started section, which now includes two new pages: Connect Frontity to Your WordPress Site and Next Steps.
  • Created a new explanatory video for the Quick Start Guide.
  • Added a new About Frontity section with two pages: Frontity Features and Get involved.
  • Moved the JS and React guides to the Key Concepts section.
  • The Welcome to Frontity page now links to the different sections of the docs.

Thanks @mburridge and @juanma!

Read full topic
item.source: Docs Update: "Getting Started" Section Improvements + New "Quick Start Guide" Video
